title: GT CRAFT [IV/MTS]
description: Content pack to add 90's sports cars.
body:
**Overview**
> Have you ever wanted to drive, drift, or customize a wide range of cars in Minecraft? GT CRAFT is the ideal content pack that author VellEagle sought to form. 12 car models. Numerous aero parts. Many customization features. Then, on August 12, 2025, GTCRAFT updated from 1.1 to 2.0, marking the start of a new evolution.


![8](https://i.ibb.co/mCgkKqmt/8.jpg)

- - -

**How to Install**
> 1. First, install the version of Forge that you want to use, either 1.12.2/1.16.5/1.18.2/1.19.2/1.20.1.
> 2. After installing Forge, once you have started Minecraft in Forge, make sure that the Mods folder is generated in the .Minecraft folder.
> 3. Download the required mod, Immersive Vehicles, and place it in the Mods folder. Choose the version to download that corresponds to the version you are playing.
> 4. Download the GT CRAFT corresponding to the version you wish to use from this site and place it in your Mods folder.
> 5. If you start Minecraft and the item is reflected, you have succeeded.

- - -

**Included cars**
> The current version includes 12 Japanese car models mainly from the 1990s. Many more models will be added in future updates.

![7](https://i.ibb.co/5hb3rBKz/7.jpg)

(Request) Anyone who has requested a car from the author, VellEagle, for a fee.

**List of Included Cars**

-List of car models-

- Mazda RX-7 FC3S
- Mazda RX-7 FD3S
- Nissan 180SX Type-X
- Nissan BNR32 SKYLINE GT-R
- Nissan BCNR33 SKYLINE GT-R
- Nissan BNR34 SKYLINE GT-R
- Nissan Silvia S13 K's
- Nissan Silvia S14 K's
- Nissan Silvia S15 Spec.R
- Subaru Impreza GC8 Version VI
- Toyota Supra A80 RZ
- Toyota AE86 Trueno

**List of vehicles deleted with the GTC-II update.** 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Chevrolet Corvette C5(Z06)
- Honda NSX NA1
- Honda NSX NA2
- Honda Civic EK9 Type-R
- Honda Integra DC2 Type-R
- **Hyundai Coupe GK 2005  (Commission by Kakuzu)**
- Mazda CX-8
- Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution III GSR
- Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution V GSR
- Mitsubishi Lancet Evolution VI GSR
- Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution VI T.M.E(Tommi Makinen Edition)
- Mitsubishi GTO(3000GT)
- Nissan R31 SKYLINE
- Nissan Gloria Y33 GranTurismo
- Nissan Fairlady Z32 Twin Turbo 2by2
- Porsche911(964) Carrera RS 3.8
- S**ubaru Impreza GVB (Commission by DeexelMC)**
- Toyota Supra A70 2.5GT Twin Turbo
- Toyota AE86 Levin
- Toyota Celica ST205
- Toyota MR2 SW20
- **Toyota Mark II JZX100 (Commission by DeexelMC/surai0705)**
- Toyota Chaser JZX100
- Dodge Viper ACR
- Ferrari FXX-K

**Basically, these cars will be re-added back in future updates, but cars added through commissions will be added back first.**

</details>

- - -
**gtcraft-2.0 Confirmed bugs**

- When changing the angle with the retractable setter, the retractable light passes its original stop position when closed.
- On some models, the turn signals overlap when the front bumper is installed.
- Nitrous oxide is not working properly.
- Some gauges do not light up.



- - -

**FAQ**
>・When shaders are added, particles and lights are displayed incorrectly.
> > This issue may be resolved by changing the rendering mode. While in the vehicle, press the P key to open the configuration menu, then change the rendering mode from “superfast” to ‘slow’ under the “Rendering” section.

>・When will the cars deleted in GTCRAFT 2.0 be added back?
> > The exact timing is still undecided, but all vehicles that were included in GTCRAFT 1.1.3 and removed in 2.0 will be added as a priority. However, vehicles added via commissions will be added as the highest priority.

- - -

**Credits**
> This content pack is adapted from a portion of the json created by the following people.
> - cowboycosmic
> - Sphase
> - Oskiinus
> - MR.NOTHING
> - DeexelMC

We would like to express our sincere thanks to the json authors.
I would also like to sincerely thank Don_bruce for creating a wonderful mod called Immersive vehicles.

- - -

**Use and introduction on Youtube, etc.**
> Basically, you don't need to get permission from me. However, if possible, please include a link to the download site in the summary. If this is not possible, it would be appreciated if you could indicate the mod name "GT CRAFT" in the title or summary.
